title: The Binding of Isaac Gameplay Map

narrative.description: The Binding of Isaac is a twin-stick roguelike where Isaac descends through procedurally generated floors, collecting item synergies that radically alter each run.
narrative.core_loop: Clear room-based floors, pick up passive and active items, manage health and keys, defeat floor bosses, and chase unlocks across permadeath runs.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac, passive relics or artifacts modify rules and combo with deck or combat systems.

mechanics.map_notes: In The Binding of Isaac, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In The Binding of Isaac, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience The Binding of Isaac through its core roguelike loop.
